flags.message: Decisive pre-snapshot forward signal used: public reporting dated May 7, 2026 (Cleveland Scene) that Cleveland agreed to a $3M settlement of the underlying Pickett class action, matching the parties' joint motion to defer consideration on the docket (motion PDF dated 2026-05-07, docketed May 29). This predates the 2026-07-16 snapshot and is not the petition's disposition (still pending); it drives the dismissed-on-settlement prediction.
